title: Extract turbo_plx_cli to standalone GitHub repository
description: Create a new public GitHub repository for turbo_plx_cli and populate it with the package's current committed state from the monorepo. This is the simplest of the three extractions — a pure Dart package with one turbo dependency (turbo_response), no example app, and no structural changes needed beyond removing workspace resolution and updating URLs.
context: turbo_plx_cli is a Dart CLI package (v0.0.3) that lives inside a monorepo called turbo_packages. It provides a Firestore-like API for local file operations via the plx CLI subprocess. It depends on turbo_response (^1.1.0) and json_annotation (^4.9.0). It uses 'resolution: workspace' in its pubspec.yaml, which means it currently resolves dependencies through the monorepo's workspace. When extracted to its own repo, it needs to resolve turbo_response from pub.dev instead — but since it already uses a ^version constraint, the dependency line itself stays the same. Only the 'resolution: workspace' line and the repository/homepage/issue_tracker URLs need changing.

before_starting: Update this task's status to 'in-progress' immediately after reading it to prevent other agents from picking it up.
Read the spec file at workspace/specs/monorepo-extraction/package-extraction/extraction-spec.json for full context on decisions and constraints.
goals: A public GitHub repository at appboypov/turbo_plx_cli exists and contains the package
The package resolves all dependencies from pub.dev (no workspace resolution)
dart analyze --fatal-infos passes with zero warnings
dart test passes with zero failures
The repo has been pushed to GitHub with an initial commit
non_goals: Do not set up CI/CD pipelines or GitHub Actions
Do not modify any files in the turbo_packages monorepo
Do not carry over git history — this is a clean start
steps_overview: Create the GitHub repo using 'gh repo create appboypov/turbo_plx_cli --public --clone' in ~/Repos/
Copy the contents of turbo_packages/turbo_plx_cli/ to the new repo root, excluding: .dart_tool/, build/, coverage/, .DS_Store, *.iml, workspace/

Edit pubspec.yaml: remove the 'resolution: workspace' line, update repository to https://github.com/appboypov/turbo_plx_cli, update homepage to https://github.com/appboypov/turbo_plx_cli, update issue_tracker to https://github.com/appboypov/turbo_plx_cli/issues
Run 'dart pub get' to verify dependency resolution from pub.dev
Run 'dart analyze --fatal-infos' to verify zero warnings
Run 'dart test' to verify all tests pass
Create a .gitignore appropriate for a Dart package if one doesn't exist (exclude .dart_tool/, build/, coverage/, .DS_Store, *.iml)
Stage all files, commit with message 'feat: initial extraction from turbo_packages monorepo', push to main
acceptance_criteria: GitHub repo appboypov/turbo_plx_cli exists and is public
Local repo at ~/Repos/turbo_plx_cli has all package source, tests, and config
pubspec.yaml repository/homepage/issue_tracker URLs point to the new repo
dart pub get resolves successfully without workspace
Main branch is pushed to GitHub with at least one commit
constraints: Do not modify any dependency version constraints — they stay exactly as they are in the monorepo
Do not add any files that don't exist in the monorepo package directory
Do not restructure the package layout — it stays flat as-is

expected_outcomes: gh repo view shows visibility: PUBLIC

after_completion: Update this task's status to 'done' and add a worklog entry describing what was done.
Move this task file to workspace/tasks/archive/dev/ using 'mv'.

Check if any open tasks in workspace/tasks/dev/ would benefit from additional context based on what you learned (e.g., gotchas with dependency resolution, .gitignore patterns needed). If so, append context to those tasks without changing their existing content.
